sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51053" key="i)so/knhmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-κνημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the legs on a level</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
